heading: TSA personnel limitations
label: 1115 TSA personnel limitations
text: Any statutory limitation on the number of employees in the Transportation Security Administration does not apply to employees carrying out this chapter.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original a reference to titles XII, XIII, XIV, and XV of , which enacted this chapter, amended , Crimes and Criminal Procedure, , Shipping, and sections 114, 5103a, 14504, 20106, 20109, 24301, 28101, 31105, and 46301 of Title 49, Transportation, enacted provisions set out as notes under and sections 114, 13908, and 14504 of Title 49, and amended provisions set out as a note under .
